---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What are you trying to do today that is painful or impossible?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the API or behavior you would like. If possible, sketch what the usage would look like:

```go
// Example of the proposed API
```

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds or alternatives have you tried? Why are they insufficient?

## Scope

- [ ] New query builder method
- [ ] New dialect support
- [ ] CLI command
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art in other ORMs, etc.
